_comment: sArthI resolution pattern registry. investigate.md looks up patterns by match_criteria and tags every emitted item with pattern_id + auto_resolve_certified. sar-fix offers to promote patterns to auto_resolve after a user-approved fix. Default: all new patterns start as auto_resolve:false until certified by a human.

patterns.description: SSLEOFError / transient network error against GCP APIs
patterns.certification_notes: Validated via ssl_eof simulator scenario Jun 8. Pattern A fires correctly, task clears and retries successfully.

patterns.description: Task exceeded execution timeout — transient, safe to clear and retry
match_criteria: Task exceeded the execution timeout period
patterns.certification_notes: Simulator scenario 'timeout' not yet validated. Certify after running: python3 simulator.py --scenario timeout && ./check.sh

patterns.description: Dataproc cluster deleted by TTL before job completion
patterns.certification_notes: Pattern B logic exists in investigate.md but no simulator scenario exists yet.

patterns.description: Teardown/cleanup task failure — safe to mark success
GCS sensor cannot find expected done file — upstream dependency missing
patterns.certification_notes: Pattern D requires GCS state check — context-dependent, not safe to auto-certify.

patterns.description: BigQuery column not found — schema mismatch (column dropped or renamed)
patterns.certification_notes: sql_error simulator scenario validated Jun 10. sar-fix flow tested (propose → review → PR). Promote to auto_resolve only after 3+ real prod fixes approved.
patterns.proposed_resolution: Use sar-fix: fetch source SQL via sarthi-git, validate correct column via sarthi-bq bq_schema, generate minimal rename/removal fix, PR to pipeline repo.

patterns.description: Data quality check failed — assertion or threshold breach
patterns.certification_notes: DQ failures require data investigation before any action. Never auto-resolve.

patterns.description: Hudi sync/commit failure — concurrent writes or marker conflict. Safe to clear and retry when recent commits exist and no dirty markers.
patterns.certification_notes: Pattern F exists in investigate.md. No simulator scenario yet. Certify after dedicated Hudi failure sim.

patterns.description: Hudi metadata table corruption in rtn_order_line — two confirmed variants: (1) MX variant: corrupt log file with empty version string causes NumberFormatException in FSUtils.getFileVersionFromLog; (2) CA variant: .hfile compaction artifact appears as a log file causing InvalidHoodiePathException in FSUtils.getFileIdFromLogPath. Both fail at query planning before any write. Root cause: hoodie.metadata.enable=true hardcoded in SparkUtil.scala (WITDnA/wcp_rap). Job fails before writing — staging data not lost, picked up on next successful run.
match_criteria: Error fetching partition paths from metadata table
Failed to retrieve list of partition from metadata
patterns.certification_notes: Confirmed Jun 10 2026. MX: 7 consecutive manual retries (04:58-10:39 UTC) before fix. CA: 1 failure at 07:24, recovered by 08:35. Root cause confirmed from SparkUtil.scala code + driver logs + hoodie.properties. hoodie.metadata.enable=true in SparkUtil.scala overrides any attempt to disable. hoodie.table.metadata.partitions=files in hoodie.properties further overrides job-level config. Data impact: staging records not loaded during outage (~4-6h) but NOT lost — staged in stg_rtn_order_line_dl, picked up on next successful MERGE. Time to resolve manually: 4h. Time to resolve with sarthi Pattern F: ~15min.

root_cause_code.fix: Change to .set("hoodie.metadata.enable", "false") — requires JAR rebuild and redeploy

definitive_resolution.summary: Two-step fix: (1) immediate GCS repair to unblock current run, (2) permanent code fix to prevent recurrence.

immediate_fix.description: Delete the entire .hoodie/metadata/ directory AND remove hoodie.table.metadata.partitions from hoodie.properties. Both steps required — hoodie.properties overrides job-level config even if code is fixed.

steps.description: Confirm job is NOT currently running before proceeding
steps.check: sarthi-airflow-read get_task_instances — ensure JB_INTLDLDAT_RTN_ORDER_LINE_HUDI_DL_* is not in running state

steps.description: Delete the Hudi metadata directory for the affected market
steps.safety: SAFE — metadata dir contains only derived index, zero business data. Data files under rtn_line_cre_dt=*/ are completely unaffected.

steps.description: Remove hoodie.table.metadata.partitions from hoodie.properties to prevent override
steps.safety: SAFE — only removes the metadata partition registration line. DO NOT remove hoodie.table.type, hoodie.table.recordkey.fields, hoodie.table.partition.fields or any other line.

steps.description: Clear failed Spark task and re-queue parent DAG run
steps.then: set_dag_run_state queued on parent WF_INTLDLDAT_CR_DP_RAP_MASTER_MX / WF_INTLDLDAT_CR_DP_RAP_MASTER_CA

permanent_fix.description: Change hoodie.metadata.enable from true to false in SparkUtil.scala. Requires JAR rebuild + GCS upload + DAG redeployment.
permanent_fix.performance_impact: GCS partition listing instead of metadata index. ~30-90s added to job startup for 700+ partition table. Negligible for a 10+ minute batch job.
permanent_fix.data_impact: None. All 5M+ rows in rtn_order_line remain intact. Staging data from outage period picked up automatically on next successful MERGE (120-day window).

never_do: Delete .hoodie/timeline/ — transaction log, table becomes unreadable
Delete rtn_line_cre_dt=*/ partition directories — actual data loss
Retry the job without GCS repair — the corrupt metadata file is re-encountered every retry, wastes 15min per attempt
